headline: Is It Too Late To Consider American International Group (AIG) After Strong Three Year Share Gains?
summary: For investors considering whether American International Group at around US$76 per share offers good value or whether the easy money has already been made, this article explores what the current price might be implying. The stock is down about 1.5% over the past week, 0.7% over the past month, and 9.4% year to date. However, the 1 year and 3 year returns of a 6.5% decline and a 55.3% gain, respectively, present a more mixed picture. Recent coverage has focused on how investors are...
